VO_VI: May thang roi chua co chuyen do.

VO_EN: Your wife holds you and doesn't let go for a long time.
VO_VI: Vo ban om ban rat lau khong buong.

VO_EN: She doesn't ask about the trip.
VO_VI: Co ay khong hoi ve chuyen di.

VO_EN: You smile.
VO_VI: Ban cuoi.

VO_EN: Your eyes don't match your mouth.
VO_VI: Mat ban khong khop voi mieng ban.

VO_EN: Your daughter hands you a drawing she made while you were gone.
VO_VI: Con gai dua ban buc ve no lam luc ban di vang.

VO_EN: It's you and her at the park.
VO_VI: Ve ban va no o cong vien.

VO_EN: You hold it like it's made of glass.
VO_VI: Ban cam no nhu cam thuy tinh.

VO_EN: You put it on the fridge with a magnet.
VO_VI: Ban dan no len tu lanh bang nam cham.

VO_EN: You look at it every morning.
VO_VI: Ban nhin no moi sang.

VO_EN: Every morning you open a bottle.
VO_VI: Moi sang ban mo mot lo.

VO_EN: One pill.
VO_VI: Mot vien thuoc.

VO_EN: Immunosuppressant.
VO_VI: Thuoc uc che mien dich.

VO_EN: Your body will try to reject what's inside you.
VO_VI: Co the ban se co dao thai thu ben trong.

VO_EN: This pill stops that.
VO_VI: Vien thuoc nay ngan dieu do.

VO_EN: You'll take it every day for the rest of your life.
VO_VI: Ban se uong no moi ngay den het doi.

VO_EN: You keep the bottle in the medicine cabinet behind the mouthwash.
VO_VI: Ban cat lo trong tu thuoc, sau chai nuoc suc mieng.

VO_EN: Your daughter once picked it up and tried to read the label.
VO_VI: Con gai ban co lan cam lo len doc nhan.

VO_EN: You took it from her gently.
VO_VI: Ban lay lai tu tay no.

VO_EN: She didn't ask again.
VO_VI: No khong hoi lai.

VO_EN: Nobody asks what it's for.
VO_VI: Khong ai hoi no la gi.

VO_EN: Every morning. Same bottle. Same time.
VO_VI: Moi sang. Cung lo. Cung gio.

VO_EN: A friend asks at dinner one night.
VO_VI: Mot buoi toi, ban be hoi.

VO_EN: So the transplant went well?
VO_VI: Ghep tang tot chu?

VO_EN: Family donor?
VO_VI: Nguoi nha hien ha?

VO_EN: You nod.
VO_VI: Ban gat dau.

VO_EN: You say your cousin.
VO_VI: Ban noi la anh ho.

VO_EN: Overseas.
VO_VI: O nuoc ngoai.

VO_EN: Very generous.
VO_VI: Tot bung lam.

VO_EN: You've rehearsed this so many times it almost sounds true.
VO_VI: Ban da tap cau nay nhieu lan den muc gan nhu nghe that.

VO_EN: You try to remember if your cousin's name was David or Daniel.
VO_VI: Ban co nho ten anh ho la David hay Daniel.

VO_EN: It doesn't matter.
VO_VI: Khong quan trong.

VO_EN: He doesn't exist.
VO_VI: Anh ta khong ton tai.

VO_EN: Your friend nods and changes the subject.
VO_VI: Ban ban gat dau va chuyen de tai.

VO_EN: You take a sip of water.
VO_VI: Ban nhap mot ngum nuoc.

VO_EN: Your hand is steady.
VO_VI: Tay ban khong run.

VO_EN: That surprises you.
VO_VI: Dieu do lam ban ngac nhien.

VO_EN: For a while it gets easier.
VO_VI: Mot thoi gian moi thu de hon.

VO_EN: Then it doesn't.
VO_VI: Roi thi khong.

VO_EN: You see a headline one morning while making breakfast.
VO_VI: Mot buoi sang ban thay dong tit bao luc lam bua sang.

VO_EN: Organ trafficking ring dismantled.
VO_VI: Triet pha duong day buon ban noi tang.

VO_EN: Twelve arrests across three countries.
VO_VI: Muoi hai nguoi bi bat o ba nuoc.

VO_EN: You read the first two lines.
VO_VI: Ban doc hai dong dau.

VO_EN: Then you turn the page.
VO_VI: Roi ban lat trang.

VO_EN: Your hands are shaking.
VO_VI: Tay ban dang run.

VO_EN: You put down the paper.
VO_VI: Ban dat to bao xuong.

VO_EN: You pick up your coffee.
VO_VI: Ban cam ly ca phe len.

VO_EN: Everything blurs for a second - the kitchen, the light, your daughter's voice from the other room - and then it comes back.
VO_VI: Moi thu mo di mot giay - cai bep, anh sang, giong con gai tu phong ben - roi lai ro tro lai.

VO_EN: You blink.
VO_VI: Ban chop mat.

VO_EN: Nobody noticed.
VO_VI: Khong ai de y.

VO_EN: Your daughter asks what's in the news.
VO_VI: Con gai hoi bao co gi.

VO_EN: You say nothing interesting.
VO_VI: Ban noi khong co gi hay.

VO_EN: The phone rings one evening while you're doing the dishes.
VO_VI: Dien thoai reo mot buoi toi luc ban dang rua bat.

VO_EN: A number you recognize.
VO_VI: So quen.

VO_EN: A voice you recognize.
VO_VI: Giong quen.

VO_EN: They ask if you need anything.
VO_VI: Ho hoi ban co can gi khong.

VO_EN: Liver segment.
VO_VI: Mot phan gan.

VO_EN: Cornea.
VO_VI: Giac mac.

VO_EN: Like they're reading from a menu.
VO_VI: Nhu dang doc thuc don.

VO_EN: You hang up.
VO_VI: Ban cup may.

VO_EN: The number is still in your phone.
VO_VI: So dien thoai van nam trong may.

VO_EN: You scroll past it sometimes.
VO_VI: Thinh thoang ban luot qua no.

VO_EN: You put the phone face down on the counter and go back to the dishes.
VO_VI: Ban up dien thoai xuong ban bep va quay lai rua bat.

VO_EN: The water is warm.
VO_VI: Nuoc am.

VO_EN: That's it.
VO_VI: Vay thoi.

VO_EN: You wake up at six fifteen.
VO_VI: Ban tinh day luc sau gio muoi lam.

VO_EN: You make coffee.
VO_VI: Ban pha ca phe.

VO_EN: Same mug.
VO_VI: Van cai coc do.

VO_EN: You drive to work.
VO_VI: Ban lai xe di lam.

VO_EN: You kiss your daughter on the forehead.
VO_VI: Ban hon len tran con gai.

VO_EN: She still barely looks up from her cereal.
VO_VI: No van con khong ngo len khoi bat ngu coc.

VO_EN: The pill bottle sits next to the coffee maker.
VO_VI: Lo thuoc nam canh may pha ca phe.

VO_EN: Everything looks the same.
VO_VI: Moi thu trong y het.

VO_EN: Something inside you keeps working.
VO_VI: Co thu ben trong ban van hoat dong.

VO_EN: You pour more coffee.
VO_VI: Ban rot them ca phe.

VO_EN: If you've ever wondered what it feels like to carry someone else inside you.
VO_VI: Neu ban tung tu hoi cam giac mang ai do ben trong minh la nhu the nao.

VO_EN: And never ask how they got there.
VO_VI: Va khong bao gio hoi ho den bang cach nao.

VO_EN: Now you know.
VO_VI: Bay gio ban biet roi.
